ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year of the data entry (foreign key to 'years' table) */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity (foreign key to 'activities' table) */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine type (foreign key to 'engine_types' table) */,
  "intensity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy intensity measurement (foreign key to 'energy_intensity' table) */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change in energy consumption (foreign key to 'change_in_energy' table) */,
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy consumption measurement (foreign key to 'energy_consumed' table) */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed in the year */,
  "energy_savings" REAL /* Total energy savings in the year */,
  "energy_intensity" REAL /* Energy intensity of the activity */,
  "change_in_energy" REAL /* Change in energy consumption compared to the previous year */,
  "activity_level" REAL /* Activity level (e.g., production volume, operational hours) */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the engine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES change_in_energy ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_energy_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_id") REFERENCES energy_consumed ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_intensity_id FOREIGN KEY ("intensity_id") REFERENCES energy_intensity ("intensity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the engine */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_intensity" (
  "intensity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy intensity measurement */,
  "intensity_value" REAL /* Value of the energy intensity */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for energy intensity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy intensity measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intensity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_in_energy" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in energy consumption */,
  "change_value" REAL /* Value of the change in energy consumption */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the change in energy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change in energy consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumed" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption measurement */,
  "energy_value" REAL /* Value of the total energy consumed */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for energy consumed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy consumption measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, manager, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry triggering the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., energy consumption alert) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)
